commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=641703e24a3e46924da1d05a796c7f20637e46ee)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a one-shot `pendingDraftClear` marker around Control UI chat draft updates and app-chat tests for stale replay after send clears the composer.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +52. Total +69 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. The issue gives browser steps, and current main can clear the local mirror after send then later commit a replayed textarea value through `syncComposerValue` while the send is active.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blocker is choosing or reworking the canonical UI-layer fix and obtaining contributor real browser proof, not a safe automated repair marker.

target.title: fix(control-ui): suppress stale draft replay after send clears composer
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
